\tzpentry{ID3799}{Curvature Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3799 introduces Curvature Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} R(t) = \left| \frac{1}{N}\sum_{i=1}^{N} e^{i\theta_i(t)} \right|, \qquad R_{\mathrm{local}}(t) = \frac{1}{N}\sum_{i=1}^{N} \left| \frac{1}{|\mathcal{N}_i|} \sum_{j\in\mathcal{N}_i} e^{i(\theta_j(t)-\theta_i(t))} \right|, \label{eq:belt_orderparams} \end{equation}
